tasks.label: audit: panel host usage
audit: search from prompt
handoff: files from prompt
assistant: request block

inputs.description: Repo-relative file paths separated by comma or semicolon
Report label, e.g. host-usage or hardcoded-colors
Repo-relative folders/files separated by comma or semicolon
File globs separated by comma or semicolon
Single assistant request. Use: mode=handoff;;; label=name;;; files=src/a.js, src/b.js OR mode=audit;;; label=name;;; paths=src;;; includes=*.js;;; pattern=regex
